courtLine: The defence asks the court to record that lab intake, continuity chain, and SFR/drugs analysis material remain outstanding before the exhibit position is fixed.
clientSummaryPreview:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Holly Reed). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. A drugs schedule may be on the papers, but lab intake, continuity/chain of custody, and SFR/drugs analysis remain outstanding before the exhibit position is fixed.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
doNotOverstate: Do not rely on drug continuity unless lab/continuity material is served.
